name: keyfinder
description: Passive API key and secret discovery for Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and Safari

scripts.build:chrome: cp manifest.json build/chrome/ && cd build/chrome && zip -r keyfinder-chrome.zip .
scripts.build:firefox: cp manifest.firefox.json build/firefox/manifest.json && cd build/firefox && zip -r keyfinder-firefox.zip .
scripts.build:edge: cp manifest.edge.json build/edge/manifest.json && cd build/edge && zip -r keyfinder-edge.zip .
scripts.build:safari: cp manifest.safari.json build/safari/manifest.json && cd build/safari && zip -r keyfinder-safari.zip .
